assertions.name: Combined Scoring Factors
assertions.description: When both recency and quality factors apply, they combine additively within score caps.
testsRun: applies dynamic weights before recency and quality adjustments
combined recency and quality boosts apply additively within score caps
combined penalty and boost scenarios work correctly
assertions.details: All 3 test cases passed. Candidates with both recent matches and high approval rates receive additive boosts (+5 +5 = +10), properly capped at 100.

assertions.name: Factor Priority
assertions.description: Recency and quality adjustments apply after base rule/vector calculation but before final cap.
testsRun: recency and quality adjustments apply after base calculation but before final cap
dynamic weights affect base score before recency/quality is applied
assertions.details: Both test cases passed. Order verified: base score (rule+vector) → recency/quality additions → final capping to 0-100 range.

assertions.name: Edge Case Interaction
assertions.description: Candidate with no lastMatchedAt AND no match history receives baseline scoring.
testsRun: entirely new candidate (no lastMatchedAt, no history) gets baseline scoring
candidate with null lastMatchedAt AND partial history gets baseline + quality
candidate with old history outside decay window gets neutral quality
assertions.details: All 3 test cases passed. Edge cases handled correctly: null timestamps result in neutral scoring, old decisions fall outside decay window.
